title: ayenia biloba
intro: Ayenia biloba, also known as the two-lobed ayenia, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It is a shrub that grows in tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Ayenia biloba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, while also providing antioxidant health benefits and immune system support.
